channel.title: The Red Canoe · Live Dispatches
channel.description: Satellite messages from Violette, Stan and Charlie — La Vérendrye canoe expedition, June 2026.

item.title: Off the put-in. P110 done. Charlie cried for two minutes then settled. · 📍 47.3123, -76.8422
item.description: Off the put-in. P110 done. Charlie cried for two minutes then settled. · 📍 47.3123, -76.8422
